# Decision Record Template

**Decision ID:** D-{number}
**Title:** {Concise decision title}
**Date:** {YYYY-MM-DD}
**Status:** Proposed | Accepted | Deprecated | Superseded
**Agent:** {Orchestrator | BSA | Coder | Reviewer}

---

## Context

{Describe the issue motivating this decision. What is the problem? What forces are at play?}

---

## Decision

{State the decision that was made. Be specific and actionable.}

---

## Rationale

{Explain why this decision was made. What factors were considered? What trade-offs were evaluated?}

---

## Alternatives Considered

### Alternative 1: {Name}

**Description:** {Brief description}

**Pros:**
- {Pro 1}
- {Pro 2}

**Cons:**
- {Con 1}
- {Con 2}

**Reason Rejected:** {Why this wasn't chosen}

### Alternative 2: {Name}

**Description:** {Brief description}

**Pros:**
- {Pro 1}

**Cons:**
- {Con 1}

**Reason Rejected:** {Why this wasn't chosen}
